name: 88888 Ranch Pickleball Resort
description: 88888 Ranch Pickleball Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wills Point, TX. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule:
Go to website to book a court Tab 
Www.88888Ranch.com

name: Little Hope Baptist Church Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Little Hope Baptist Church Gym in Canton, TX! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Old City Lake Park
description: Old City Lake Park is a place to play pickleball in Canton, TX. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Ron and Nancy Perry Memorial Pickleball Courts
description: Your home for pickleball fun is here! These courts at Cheatham Memorial Methodist Church are dedicated to the memory of Ron and Nancy Perry, whose selfless lives inspired community and connection. Join us for fun, friendship, and pickleball, whether you're a seasoned pro or just discovering the game.
fees: Members only — Membership is Free of Charge

name: Running B Farm Pickleball Court
description: Running B Farm Pickleball Court is a place to play pickleball in Canton, TX. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and water.

name: Sonic Drive-In Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Sonic Drive-In Pickleball in Canton, TX! There are 3 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. Reservations are available.
